name: ClinicalBridge
description: AI-powered clinical decision support for discharge planning. Covers patient FHIR data retrieval, drug interaction checking, ICD-10 code suggestions, follow-up scheduling, and AI discharge summary generation. All data is 100% synthetic.
author: NinadHirani

tools.name: get_patient_summary
tools.description: Retrieve structured patient data from FHIR R4 (demographics, conditions, medications, allergies)

tools.name: check_drug_interactions
tools.description: Check medications for dangerous interactions using FDA data + LLM synthesis

tools.name: get_icd10_suggestions
tools.description: Suggest ICD-10-CM billing codes for clinical conditions with confidence scores

tools.name: find_followup_slots
tools.description: Find available follow-up appointment slots by specialty and ZIP code

tools.name: generate_discharge_summary
tools.description: AI-powered synthesis of all clinical data into a complete discharge document
